name: Irish Soda Bread

ingredients.item: tiny chocolate chips, raisins, or currents are all excellent

method: Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit (190 degrees Celsius). Cooking
sprays an ovenproof 10" skillet and layers the bottom with
Combine flour, 14 cup sugar, baking soda, and salt in a medium
mixing basin. Work in the butter with a pastry cutter or your
Combine buttermilk and egg in a separate medium bowl. Stir in
the wet ingredients until just mixed. Make sure not to overmix!
If using, fold in chocolate chips, raisins, or currents.
With a sharp knife, score an "X" on top of the dough in the
skillet. Brush with melted butter and, if desired, sprinkle with
the remaining sugar. Cook for 45–55 minutes, or till golden
brown and a toothpick inserted in the middle comes out clean.
The bread should sound hollow when you tap it. Allow 10
minutes to cool before slicing and serving.
